data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A16CD: It's soft, loamy soil.\nWant to plant a BERRY?
data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A16FB: {PLAYER} planted one {STR_VAR_1} BERRY in\nthe soft, loamy soil.
data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A17C0: There are {STR_VAR_2} {STR_VAR_1} BERRIES!\pDo you want to pick the\n{STR_VAR_1} BERRIES?
data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A181A: {PLAYER} put away the {STR_VAR_1} BERRIES\nin the BAG's BERRIES POCKET.\pThe soil returned to its soft and\nloamy state.
data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A1881: The BAG's BERRIES POCKET is full.\pThe {STR_VAR_1} BERRIES couldn't be taken.
data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A18E6: Want to water the {STR_VAR_1} with the\nWAILMER PAIL?
data_text_berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A1925: The plant seems to be delighted.
